title: Dark Acolyte Trio
content:
{{Top|canon=Dark Acolyte Duo}} {{Top|leg}} {{Nickname}} {{MilitaryUnit |image=[[File:Star_Wars_the_Clone_Wars_Dark_Acolytes.png]] |name=Dark Acolyte Trio |type= |formation= |commander= |second= |staff= |subunit= |strength= |vehicles=3 [[Sith Enforcer]]s[[Star Wars: The Clone Wars (video game)|''Star Wars: The Clone Wars'' video game]] |headquarters= |location=[[Geonosis/Legends|Geonosis]] |battles=[[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|Battle of Geonosis]] |formed= |founded= |fragmented= |reorganized= |dissolved=[[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]] |restored= |affiliation=*[[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] *[[Order of the Sith Lords]] }} {{Quote|Our Master told us you would come."
"Where is he?"
"He is inside, entertaining your friends. Unfortunately, you were not invited.|A Dark Acolyte and Mace Windu|}} The '''Dark Acolyte Trio''' was a group of [[Dark Acolyte/Legends|Dark Acolytes]] serving [[Count/Legends|Count]] [[Dooku/Legends|Dooku]] in the [[Standard month/Legends|months]] leading up to the [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|Battle of Geonosis]]. During the Battle of [[Geonosis/Legends|Geonosis]], the Dark Acolytes defended [[Dooku's hangar/Legends|Dooku's hangar]] with [[Sith Enforcer]]s. Piloting a [[TX-130 Saber-class fighter tank/Legends|TX-130 ''Saber''-class fighter tank]], [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Mace Windu/Legends|Mace Windu]] killed the three Dark Acolytes in a [[Hovertank/Legends|hovertank]] battle outside the [[Hangar/Legends|hangar]]. ==Appearances== *[[Star Wars: The Clone Wars (video game)|''Star Wars: The Clone Wars'' video game]] {{1st}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Dark Acolytes}} {{Interlang |es=Trio de Acólitos Oscuros }} [[Category:Dark Acolytes]]
